label: q8_t16_decode_second_pass_rejected_after_router256
scope: Reopened Task #2 dense/shared GGUF Q8_0 T16 decode GEMV after router256. Requirement: retain only if acceptable for both Q4_K_M and Q4_K_S. Current comparison baseline is the accepted router256 artifact.

validation.final_source_state: All temporary Q8_0 T16 changes reverted; retained source is unchanged from the router256 baseline.
validation.post_revert_command: HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt PYTHONPATH=. uv run pytest tests/test_gguf_q8_0_t16_gemv_decode.py tests/test_gguf_linear_dispatch.py -q

probes.name: q8_t16_all_launches_block64
probes.change: Temporary launch-shape probe: changed all Q8_0 T16 GEMV launches from block 128 to block 64 while leaving the 4-wave scratch allocation intact.
probes.correctness: HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt PYTHONPATH=. uv run pytest tests/test_gguf_q8_0_t16_gemv_decode.py tests/test_gguf_linear_dispatch.py -q => 61 passed
probes.reason: Q4_K_S decode regressed before running the Q4_K_M gate.

probes.name: q8_t16_all_launches_block256
probes.change: Temporary launch-shape probe: changed Q8_0 T16 kernels to launch_bounds(256,2), launch block 256, and 8-wave exchange scratch. An intermediate version with only block 256 and 4-wave scratch failed correctness with out-of-bounds shared exchange, then the corrected 8-wave version passed tests.
probes.correctness: Corrected 8-wave version: HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt PYTHONPATH=. uv run pytest tests/test_gguf_q8_0_t16_gemv_decode.py tests/test_gguf_linear_dispatch.py -q => 61 passed
probes.reason: Q4_K_S decode remained below the router256 baseline before running the Q4_K_M gate.

probes.name: q8_t16_shared_gate_up_dual_silu_fusion
probes.change: Temporary structural probe: added a BF16 ABI-preserving Q8_0 T16 dual gate/up+SiLU kernel for shared-expert decode, Python wrapper/registry key, dispatch helper, runtime routing, and tests. The fused kernel rounded gate/up accumulators to BF16 before SiLU to match the unfused dual-GEMV + silu_mul_dual_out chain.
probes.correctness: HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt PYTHONPATH=. uv run pytest tests/test_gguf_q8_0_t16_gemv_decode.py tests/test_gguf_linear_dispatch.py tests/test_qwen35_gguf_compact_moe_gemv_routing.py -q => 71 passed while the probe was applied
probes.reason: The extra accumulators/register pressure outweighed the saved shared-expert SiLU launch; Q4_K_S failed the gate before Q4_K_M measurement.

decision: No dense/shared Q8_0 T16 decode source change retained in this second pass. Simple launch-shape changes and the natural shared gate/up+SiLU fusion all regress Q4_K_S against the current router256 baseline. Further Q8 work likely needs parent-workspace kernel R&D / new layout rather than additional hipENGINE-local tweaks.
